hypothesis: Mean-reversion to session VWAP after over-extension: fade back toward VWAP when price >= 2 VWAP-std-dev bands away (above-band->PUT, below-band->CALL), RSI(14) exhaustion confirm, invalidation at 3-SD band.

sourced_rules.entry: close >= VWAP + 2*sigma -> PUT (short fade); close <= VWAP - 2*sigma -> CALL (long fade). 2-SD band is the source-converged threshold.
sourced_rules.confirm: RSI(14) >= 70.0 for PUT / <= 30.0 for CALL (Wilder; source high-prob variant 75/25).
sourced_rules.fresh: only the bar that FIRST crosses the band fires (no re-fire while a trend rides the band).
sourced_rules.target: revert to VWAP (engine TP1: chart-level/premium fallback + v15 exits).
sourced_rules.stop: published invalidation = VWAP +/- 3*sigma, passed as rejection_level (CALL: support below; PUT: resistance above).

published_edge_context: 2-SD band bounce ~61-64% WR @ 1.4-1.8:1 RR (SPY 180-session + QuantConnect 2022 100-NASDAQ-stock backtests); 3-SD ~71%. SPY-DIRECTION proxy only — NOT our 0DTE option edge (C3/L58); replaced below with real OPRA fills (C1).
verdict: NO CANDIDATE — no cell clears the full bar (OOS/trade>0 AND pos_q>=4/6 AND top5<200% AND n>=20 AND drop-top5/trade>0). The VWAP-band extension fade does not show a robust real-fills 0DTE option edge on 2025-01..2026-05. Best cell shown for disclosure only (anti-pattern 2.10 — not cherry-picked as a survivor).

DISCLOSURE.authority: real OPRA fills (C1) — supersedes any SPY-direction proxy
DISCLOSURE.per_trade: expectancy (avg_pnl) reported per OP-14, NOT WR standalone
DISCLOSURE.concentration: top5_day_pct + drop-top-5-days per-trade reported per OP-20 #5
DISCLOSURE.anti_cherry_pick: per anti-pattern 2.10, the bar requires OOS>0 + pos_q>=4/6 + top5<200% + n>=20 + drop-top5>0 simultaneously; a single thin/concentrated/OOS-negative positive cell does NOT clear it.
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: the published WR is a SPY-direction proxy; this run is the option-edge test (C3/L58).
